description: Registry of all external Claude Code plugin sources endorsed or vendored by Roxabi. Source of truth for upstream URLs, sync state, and curation status. See CLAUDE.md ## External Ecosystem for full workflow documentation.

curated_marketplaces.name: identifier, kebab-case
curated_marketplaces.last_checked_commit: HEAD SHA at last CI check (HEAD — no branch tracking unless upstream_branch set)
curated_marketplaces.upstream_branch: (optional) branch to check instead of HEAD, e.g. main
curated_marketplaces.criteria_met: array: marketplace_json | install_mechanism | maintained_90d | quality_content | lt50pct_overlap

wrapped_plugins.upstream_url: .git URL for subtree strategy; repo URL for copy strategy
wrapped_plugins.upstream_path: subdirectory within repo (copy strategy only, e.g. skills/vercel-cli)
wrapped_plugins.last_sync_commit: SHA of upstream HEAD at last sync
wrapped_plugins.notes: free text — attribution, license, conflict notes

curated_marketplaces.name: agent-browser
curated_marketplaces.notes: Headless browser automation CLI for AI agents (Rust + Playwright). Ships agent-browser skill with snapshot-ref navigation, session management, auth, proxy, and video recording. Complements web-intel (scraping) — browser fills the interactive/auth gap.
